response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and real-time systems, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit infrastructure — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Experienced in event-driven systems and real-time data processing with DLang and Node.js
Active contributor to open-source agentic and GIS platforms demonstrating architectural initiative
Strong engineering culture practices (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews) across multiple roles
concerns: No demonstrable experience building or operating production multi-agent AI systems in fintech
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record in regulated financial systems, credit risk modeling, or compliance infrastructure
